Country_Year_vaccination number_information type. Country denotes the country of the reactive vaccination campaign. Year denotes the year the reactive vaccination campaign started. Vaccination number indicates the overarching reactive vaccination campaign that that reactive vaccination campeign was a part of.  The information type denotes the method of which the coverage was recorded. im means independent monitoring, admin means administrative coverage, post
